text:
単に優秀なランチャー使いなら
これまで掃いて捨てるほどいた。

だが己にうぬぼれず、最後まで
任務を全うした者を私は知らない。

ドラゴン・エクスを仕留めてなお
謙虚な姿勢で私の前に帰

Nothing special about being decent with
a Launcher. Plenty of people could hit the side
of a barn.

But you know what's rare? Someone with a
Launcher who sees their duty through to the
end and doesn't get a big ego about it.

Go out on this Dragon X hunt and
show me you can still be humble
when you come back here.
